---
title: "PeroxiBot: AI Research Assistant"
---

Chat with PeroxiBot, an AI trained on the PEX26-F51L scientific literature. The
assistant answers questions based strictly on the uploaded research papers and
cites its sources.

[💬 Open PeroxiBot](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/6c5550cb-f1e7-475b-89b1-9422fa615f96/preview){target="_blank"}
